name: Zenless Zone Zero RP
description:
ZZZ Rp

Best Hoyoverse game in my opinion. That's the reason why I made this bot.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE AGED UP!!!

My discord server: https://discord.gg/bRmknkqZEd

RECOMMEND TO USE WITH PROXY API (or any other api that supports big amount of tokens, around 100k)!!! [But it works with Janitor LLM though] (Guide in my discord server)

Btw another version of greeting. If you don't like initial one you can insert this one and mention your position in story, your relationships and other things. Just don't send it like this, add some own action like... You walked to 141 or Waterfall Soup idk. Otherwise bot just will speak for you.

Second greeting message by cag_larper, thank him for this beautiful freedom of act version^^
